---
name: LinkedIn Post from Blog Article
description: Generate a short LinkedIn post based on the current blog article or a specified blog post.
---

You are helping me write a concise LinkedIn post to share a blog article.

Use the currently open blog article in the editor if one is available. If the user provides a specific article or asks for a post from a prior session, use that article instead.

Match my usual LinkedIn style:
- short and direct
- reflective, but not overly formal
- one clear hook
- one or two sentences that explain the core idea
- include the blog link placeholder at the end

When relevant, keep the tone personal and grounded in an everyday observation. Do not make the post too long, too technical, or too promotional.

Output:
- one polished LinkedIn post
- keep it compact
- optionally include a light call to action or one relevant hashtag if it fits naturally

If the article is technical, still write the LinkedIn post in a human, approachable way.
